title: Bridge Paper: Transcendental meditation for veterans with post-traumatic stress disorder.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Mantra — inner speech, focused attention meditation, chanting neural effects.
**Phase context:** mantra, mantra meditation, chanting, inner speech, focused attention meditation

Paper: Transcendental meditation for veterans with post-traumatic stress disorder.
DOI: 10.1037/tra0000346
Abstract: OBJECTIVE: Transcendental Meditation (TM) is a mental technique using a mantra to facilitate meditation. TM has a potential for treating symptoms of posttraumatic stress disorder (PTSD), but its clinical efficacy remains to be clarified. This pilot study evaluated the acceptability, preliminary effectiveness, and neurophysiology of TM for veterans with PTSD.
